description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperMesh upper with synthetic and suede overlaysSynthetic twill tape laces in dual tonesSynthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefootFormstripe on the sidComfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortMidsoleLightweight Trinomic midsoleOutsoleMade of high traction rubberMultidirectional lugs and flex grooves on the outsoleshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
